rationale: Developer tools require high clarity, extended session comfort, and a data-dense layout. Dark mode is standard. We use a technical 'Grid Borders' style to expose the skeleton of the app, fitting the 'CodeLens' visualizer theme.

spacing_and_layout.general: Dense, 100vh layout with rigid panels. Scrollable inner areas. No soft rounded corners; use rounded-none or max 4px radius.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 flex-shrink-0 bg-[#09090B] h-full flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-[#09090B]
spacing_and_layout.right_panel: w-80 border-l border-zinc-800 flex-shrink-0 bg-[#121214] h-full flex flex-col

component_styles.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-none), 1px solid border. Hover state lifts slightly with solid shadow or alters border color to accent.
component_styles.inputs: bg-[#09090B] border-zinc-800 border focus:border-yellow-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-400 rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm
component_styles.tabs: flex border-b border-zinc-800. Active tab has border-b-2 border-yellow-400 text-zinc-50. Inactive text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-200. No background changes.
component_styles.tree_view: Hover row bg-zinc-800/50. Left border indicator (2px yellow) for active file. Mono font for file names.
component_styles.graphs_diagrams: Nodes should be sharp rectangles with 1px border. Dark background with subtle grid pattern. Edges should be straight or orthogonal, not curved.
component_styles.badges: px-1.5 py-0.5 border border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-800 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-mono text-zinc-300

visual_enhancers.grid_borders: The skeleton is visible. Use border-collapse style layout for tables, property lists, and layout panels.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Strictly avoided. Use solid dark backgrounds for maximum technical legibility.
visual_enhancers.retro_futurism: Subtle yellow highlighting for active/selected nodes. Mono-spaced typographic scale for all data points.

icons_and_assets.style: 1px stroke, sharp, unopinionated. Size 16px for inline, 20px for sidebar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'JetBrains Mono'.
Use .js/.jsx files exclusively, DO NOT use .tsx as this environment uses JavaScript.
Implement a strict 3-pane IDE layout for the main CodeLens view: Sidebar (nav/tree), Center (code/graph/diff), Right (annotations).
Do not use card components with soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders and flat colors across the board.

For the Dependency Graph and Architecture diagram, you may use standard DOM nodes positioned absolutely, or an SVG canvas if applicable, ensuring technical aesthetic with right-angled connection lines.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., tabs, tree nodes, graph nodes, annotation inputs).
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout instead of Shadcn containers to maintain the rigid 'Control Room' app-like aesthetic.
Ensure hover states explicitly set text color to ensure contrast is maintained against dark backgrounds.
